zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle De Dover of Chilham於1247年12月12日出生在英國肯特爾哈姆 卡素時，她的父親Richard de Dover - Baron of Chilham27歲，母親Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu32歲。她於大約1264年與David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1292年3月18日在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle De Dover of Chilham于1247年12月12日出生在英国肯特爾哈姆 卡素时，她的父亲Richard de Dover - Baron of Chilham27岁，母亲Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu32岁。她于大约1264年与David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1292年3月18日在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dover
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either the port of Dover in Kent, named from the river on which it stands, Celtic dubrās meaning ‘the waters’ (which has become modern Welsh dwfr ‘water’), or Dover in Wigan, Lancashire.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhuidhir or Mac Duibhidhir; see Dwyer .
Americanized form of German   Dauer   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Dwyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Parnell, Liam, Brigid, Cormac, Oonagh, Patrick Michael.

Irish (southern Ireland): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhuidhir, a variant of Ó Duibhidhir (see Diver ), or Mac Duibhidhir ‘descendant of Duibhuidhir’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘dark, black’ + odhar ‘sallow, tawny’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle De Dover of Chilham was born on 12 December 1247, in Chilham Castle, Kent, England, her father, Richard de Dover - Baron of Chilham, was 27 and her mother, Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu, was 32. She married David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl about 1264. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 18 March 1292, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle De Dover of Chilham est née le 12 décembre 1247, à Chilham Castle, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Dover - Baron of Chilham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl environ 1264. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 mars 1292, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle De Dover of Chilham am 12. Dezember 1247 in Chilham Castle, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Dover - Baron of Chilham 27 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu 32. Sie hat um 1264 David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. März 1292 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle De Dover of Chilham è nata il il 12 dicembre 1247 nel Chilham Castle, Kent, England, sua padre, Richard de Dover - Baron of Chilham, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl circa 1264. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 marzo 1292, nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle De Dover of Chilhamが1247年12月12日にイギリスケントチルハム カストルで生まれた時，父Richard de Dover - Baron of Chilhamは27歳，母Matilda de Angus Countess of Anguは32歳であった。約1264年にDavid Strathbogie 8th Earl of Athollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1292年3月18日にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle De Dover of Chilham(이)가 1247년 12월 12일 영국 켄트 치함 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Dover - Baron of Chilham(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1264년 David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1292년 3월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에 묻혔다.

pt.12 December 1247–18 March 1292: 12 de dezembro de 1247–18 de março de 1292
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle De Dover of Chilham nasceu em 12 de dezembro de 1247, em Chilham Castle, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Dover - Baron of Chilham, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl aproximadamente 1264. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de março de 1292, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle De Dover of Chilham родилась 12 декабря 1247 г. в местности чилхам кастл, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Dover - Baron of Chilham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl около 1264 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 марта 1292 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.12 December 1247–18 March 1292: 12 de diciembre de 1247–18 de marzo de 1292
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle De Dover of Chilham nació el 12 de diciembre de 1247, en Chilham Castle, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Dover - Baron of Chilham, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Matilda de Angus Countess of Angu, tenía 32 años. Se casó con David Strathbogie 8th Earl of Atholl aproximadamente 1264. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1292, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
